overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing the protagonist Geralt walking through a medieval European harbor town. The character moves from a narrow cobblestone market street up stone stairs and along waterfront promenades, passing various NPCs and market vendors in a bright sunlit fantasy setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow market street with canvas vendor stalls

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily through a narrow cobblestone street lined with market stalls, carrying two swords on his back

notable_agents.action: villager in blue hat standing near a wooden table stall

entered.detail: tall stone wall with wooden scaffolding and greenery on top running along the left side of the street
wooden market stall with beige canvas awning and barrels underneath
traditional medieval half-timbered houses with dark wooden beams and plaster facades
wooden construction scaffolding attached to the stone wall

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through a narrow medieval market street with a high stone wall on the left and canvas market stalls on the right. The cobblestone path is lined with wooden scaffolding, and half-timbered buildings rise in the background. Various NPC villagers populate the street, including a vendor near a wooden table.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone staircase leading to upper waterfront level

events.description: Geralt begins ascending a wide stone staircase leading up from the market street to the waterfront promenade

agents.ego_description: Geralt climbing a set of wide stone stairs with wooden beams embedded as steps, approaching the upper harbor level

entered.detail: wide stone stairs with wooden plank inlays leading upward to the waterfront
calm water canal visible to the right beyond the stairs

segments.scene_description: Geralt ascends a wide stone staircase leading from the lower market area to an upper waterfront promenade. The stone retaining wall falls away to the left while the canal becomes visible to the right. The camera moves steadily upward, transitioning from the enclosed street to the more open harbor level.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated waterfront walkway with wooden railings overlooking the canal

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking along an elevated dirt path beside the water, passing NPCs and approaching a wooden bridge section

notable_agents.action: armed guard in striped clothing standing by the wooden railing overlooking the water

entered.detail: wooden fence railing running along the edge of the waterfront path
patches of grass and wildflowers growing along the water's edge
tall stone watchtower with conical roof visible across the water

segments.scene_description: At the top of the stairs, Geralt walks along an elevated waterfront path with wooden railings overlooking the canal. The ground transitions to dirt with grassy patches. A guard in striped clothing stands by the railing, and a distinctive stone watchtower rises in the distance across the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden dock marketplace with vendor stalls and produce stands

events.description: transition from dirt path to cobblestone and wooden dock planks, entering the dock market area

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through a bustling dock market, passing vendors and shoppers near an orange canvas stall

notable_agents.action: vendor in gray dress arranging produce at a vegetable stall

entered.detail: large market stall with bright orange canvas awning and wooden barrels
weathered wooden planks forming the dock walkway with scattered lumber
wooden crates and baskets filled with vegetables and goods
metal lanterns hanging from wooden posts along the dock

segments.scene_description: Geralt enters a lively dock market area with cobblestone transitioning to wooden planks. An orange canvas market stall dominates the right side with produce crates and barrels. The water is now immediately adjacent on the right, separated by a wooden railing. Various NPCs browse the goods while hanging lanterns line the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden pier with moored sailboat and fishing equipment

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking along the wooden pier approaching a moored sailboat, passing fishermen and dock workers

notable_agents.action: woman in orange dress walking ahead toward the sailboat

entered.detail: small wooden sailboat with beige canvas sail tied to the dock
thick wooden bollards and posts for tying boats
nets and fishing equipment draped over the dock railing

segments.scene_description: Geralt continues along the wooden pier, now fully on wooden decking with the water lapping alongside. A small sailboat with a beige canvas sail is moored to the right, with wooden posts and fishing nets visible. The stone watchtower remains visible in the distance across the water as the character approaches the end of the dock.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined medieval market street that gradually opens into a wide, sunlit harbor promenade. It begins by following Geralt through a narrow cobblestone path flanked by high stone walls and canvas stalls, moving past villagers and wooden scaffolding. As the character ascends a wide stone staircase, the enclosed street gives way to an elevated waterfront path where the terrain shifts to dirt and grass, revealing a distant stone watchtower across the canal. The scene then transitions into a lively dock market as the ground changes from stone to wooden planks, passing orange canvas stalls and hanging lanterns beside the water's edge. Finally, the camera moves fully onto a wooden pier where a beige sailboat is moored, continuing toward the end of the dock with the watchtower remaining visible in the distance.
